title: stenophalium gardneri
intro: Stenophalium gardneri, also known as the "Gardner's Stenophalium" or "Cordia gardneriana", is a plant species in the borage family (Boraginaceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The leaves and flowers of the Stenophalium gardneri plant have been used to treat fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues, and it is also believed to have antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, are commonly used to promote overall health and well-being, and to alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and other respiratory infections.
